SEARCH
Package com.stevenlagoy.presidency.characters

Class Candidate

java.lang.Object
com.stevenlagoy.presidency.characters.CharacterJava
com.stevenlagoy.presidency.characters.PoliticalActorJava
com.stevenlagoy.presidency.characters.Candidate
All Implemented Interfaces:
HasPersonality, Jsonic<Character>, Repr<Character>
Direct Known Subclasses:
Player
public class Candidate extends PoliticalActor
A Character subclass which extends PoliticalActor and models a Candidate in the Presidential race.

Contains fields and methods particular to a Candidate's campaign details and information.

See Also:

  • PoliticalActor
